creator: darren780@yahoo.com
text:
Having an issue with blinking background text(when covered by div). Unsure of what could be causing the problem. I have no error output from executing in console. To try and fix the issue I compiled the whole system from scratch hoping it might bug fix itself.  Also text occasionally bolds like it is being redrawn poorly.  

Here is a video of the issue: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I4CFjyv39VQ

How-To-Repeat: I use the facebook game kingdoms of camelot with scriptish installed and the addon http://code.google.com/p/koc-power-bot/

However it is possible that it would reproduce with any sort of div that covers other parts of the page.
